prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8150→8722→10553→7841→8497，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字先增后降再增），2025年基准约8497名；近3年波动幅度较大，2023 年曾下探至10553名，2024年回升至7841名，2025年又回落至8497名，显示该校在黑龙江省物理类考生中的竞争热度存在年度波动；本省物理类计划2021年39人 、2022年41人、2023年42人、2024年41人、2025年50人，呈逐年小幅增加趋势；2026年计划48人，较2025年减少2人（缩招4%），缩招将加剧竞争，推动最低位次小幅前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学是教育部直属985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第40名，近年稳定在38–40名区间，属于中坚985层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面，共8个事件中6个为正面，主要涉及校园人文关怀事件（硕士毕业生致谢保卫部默许拾荒老人进校），提升了学校形象；抖音热度总排名第53 位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度处于正常水平；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，草学A+、生态学A+、化学A-、地理学A-、生 物学A-，共5个A-及以上学科；其中化学、生态学、生物学与物理类招生的化学类、生态学、生物技术等专业直接对应，草学（基地班）为该校王牌特色专业。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，兰州大学物理类招生涵盖计算机类、电子信息类、人工智能等热门方向，对考生吸引 力较强；黑龙江省2026年高考总人数约167000人，按2025年物理类占比68.2%估算约113894人，较2025年117407人略降约3%，竞争压力略有缓解；兰州大学位于甘肃省兰州市，距黑龙江省较远，属于跨省就读；该校在黑龙江省 招生占比约2.2%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8497名、2026年缩招4%加剧竞争、考生总数略降部分抵消、学校 声誉偏正面、热门专业吸引力较强等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移（更难进）；预测位次约8243名，区间7743–8743名。

一档（最难进）

- 电子信息类（含基地班）（包含电子信息科学与技术、通信工程、人工智能）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8150 → 8722 → 10553 → 7841 → 8497, showing a fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers first increased, then decreased, then increased again), with a baseline of about 8497 in 2025; the fluctuation range has been large in recent 3 years, dropping to 10553 in 2023, rebounding to 7841 in 2024, and falling back to 8497 in 2025, indicating annual fluctuations in the competition heat of this university among Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 39 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 50 in 2025, showing a gradual slight increase year by year; the 2026 plan is 48, a decrease of 2 (4% reduction) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push the minimum ranking slightly forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a directly affiliated 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education; it ranks 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, with 6 out of 8 events being positive, mainly involving campus humanistic care incidents (a master's graduate thanked the security department for allowing a scrap collector to enter the school), enhancing the university's image; Douyin heat total ranking is 53rd (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms, and the application attention is at a normal level; no obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Grassland Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above; among them, Chemistry, Ecology, and Biology directly correspond to Chemistry, Ecology, and Biotechnology majors in Physics Category enrollment, and Grassland Science (Base Class) is the university's signature specialty.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026. Lanzhou University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Artificial Intelligence, which are attractive to candidates; the total number of candidates in Heilongjiang Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 167,000, estimated at about 113,894 based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of 68.2%, a slight decrease of about 3% from 117,407 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, far from Heilongjiang Province, so it is a cross-province study; the university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.2% (2025), which is moderately low, and regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8497, the 4% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the slight decrease in total candidates partially offsetting, the slightly positive university reputation, and the strong appeal of popular majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move slightly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025; the predicted ranking is about 8243, with a range of 7743–8743.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Base Class) (includes Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information (including Base Class) (includes Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Integrated Circuit Design and Application Innovation Class)
- Stomatology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine
- Physics (Base Class) / Theoretical and Applied Mechanics (Base Class)
- Statistics
- Atmospheric Science / Applied Meteorology (Smart Meteorology Innovation Class)
- Chemistry (Base Class) / Chemical Engineering and Technology (Energy Storage and Hydrogen Energy Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (includes Economics, International Economics and Trade, Finance)
- Business Administration (includes Accounting, Human Resource Management, Administrative Management, Information Management and Information Systems)
- Civil Engineering (Smart Civil Engineering Innovation Class)
- Geological Engineering
- Pharmacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 8243, with a range of 7743–8743. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 7743 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Stomatology); candidates around 8243 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Clinical Medicine, Physics Base Class, Statistics, etc.) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit of 8743 are advised to use Tier 3 as a safety net (Economics, Business Administration, Civil Engineering Innovation Class, etc.) while also trying Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1105 → 1073 → 980 → 1431 → 1212, showing an overall trend of rising first, then falling, and then fluctuating; from 2021 to 2023, rankings moved forward year by year (from 1105 to 980), dropped significantly to 1431 in 2024, and rebounded to 1212 in 2025; fluctuations have been larger in the past two years, with a baseline of about 1212 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 15 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, with a notable reduction in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13, an increase of 3 (30% expansion) compared to 2025, which will significantly ease competition and push the minimum ranking further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a directly affiliated 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university under the Ministry of Education; it ranked 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly involving campus humanistic care incidents that enhanced the school's image; Douyin popularity total ranking is 53rd (relatively hot), with above-average exposure on short video platforms; no record of History Category admission cut-off breaks; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Grassland Science A+, Ecology A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-; the History Category enrollment majors (Marxist Theory, Political Science, Law, Chinese Language and Literature, History, etc.) do not directly correspond to the above advantageous disciplines, but as a comprehensive 985 university, Lanzhou University has a solid liberal arts foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Teacher training/education differentiation is in a wait-and-see state; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang college entrance examination is about 167,000, with an estimated 53,106 in the History Category based on the 2025 proportion of 31.8%, a slight decrease of about 3% from 54,707 in 2025, slightly easing competition; 2026 data is missing; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, far from Heilongjiang Province; the university's enrollment proportion in the province is about 2.2% (2025), which is moderately low; the geographical preference for cross-province study has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1212, a significant 30% expansion in 2026 easing competition, a slight decrease in total candidates, and a slightly positive school reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift significantly backward (easier to enter); the predicted ranking is about 1510, with a range of 1283–1737.

- History (Base Class)
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Political Science (including Political Science and Administration, International Politics)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 1510, with a range of 1283–1737. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 1283 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 (Law, History Base Class, Chinese Language and Literature); those around 1510 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Marxist Theory, Political Science) while also attempting Tier 1; those near the upper limit of 1737 are advised to use Tier 3 as a safety net (Sociology, Russian) and can also try Tier 2 majors.
